Talk to us
Maritime · Transport · Logistics

Unlocking long-term value where most advisors stop short

Operator-led advisory for private equity firms and business owners across maritime, transport, and logistics, from diligence through value creation.

Talk to an operator See how we work
Why Navex

We advise on the deal, then help run the business after.

We have operated these businesses ourselves, not just advised on them. We are PE-fluent: we speak the language of sponsors, theses, and returns.

Most advisors stop at the deal

  • Bankers broker it
  • Consultants model it
  • Data houses sell the numbers
  • Then they are gone

We stay and run the value creation

  • We do the operational work before you commit
  • We take the seat after you close
  • One team across the whole lifecycle
Across the full lifecycle
1

Diligence

Commercial and operational due diligence before you commit.

2

Value creation

Operating-model and margin work that delivers the thesis.

3

Board & interim

Hands-on leadership through the phases that decide the return.

4

Exit readiness

Positioning the business for a strong, well-timed outcome.

Proof

Results, not slideware

25+
Years operating maritime & transport businesses
7
Private equity sponsors partnered with
5
Exits delivered
10+
Bolt-on acquisitions executed
$1bn+
Enterprise value shaped

Figures reflect the founding team's operator experience prior to Navex.

Interim leadership · Maritime services (PE-backed)

Stepping in to run the value-creation phase

Took an interim CXO seat at a sponsor-backed maritime services operator, bridging founders, management, and the investor through a critical operating period.

Result: ~10% EBITDA uplift over roughly six months.

Team engagement, prior to Navex.
See case studies
What we do

Five ways we create value

We lead with the work that sets us apart: the commercial, operational, and leadership stages other advisors leave to someone else.

Commercial & Operational Due Diligence

We pressure-test growth, cost, and risk before you commit, pre-LOI and post-LOI, with margin and pricing audits and a hard look at the management team.

See how this works

Value Creation & Growth Planning

Operating-model design, cost optimization, and margin improvement that turn the investment thesis into results, both organic and through bolt-ons.

See how this works

Board & Interim Leadership

Interim CXO and board roles that bridge founders, management, and sponsors during transitions, keeping post-deal milestones on track.

See how this works

Strategic Advisory for PE Firms

Proprietary deal sourcing, target screening, and competitive positioning across the deal lifecycle, with strategy refined to protect value post-close.

See how this works

Investment Readiness for Owners

Commercial, operational, and financial readiness ahead of a sale or recapitalization, with positioning guidance to attract institutional capital.

See how this works

Not sure where you sit?

Tell us about the deal or the business. We'll point to the work that matters most right now.

Start a conversation
Industries

Sectors we know from the inside

Deep, hands-on experience across the maritime value chain: the businesses we have operated, not just analyzed.

Maritime & Shipping

Fleet economics, asset cycles & charter exposure

Marine Services

Towage, offshore support & specialist operations

Port & Terminal Logistics

Throughput, handling efficiency & capex

Transport & Logistics

Seaborne freight, intermodal & supply chains
How we're different

Aligned to your outcome, not to a fee

Independence is the point. We are not brokers chasing a close, and we do not sell data.

Paid for judgment

Our value is the decision we help you make, including when the honest answer is to walk away from a deal.

No conflicts

We do not broker the transaction or sell the numbers, so there is no agenda hiding behind the advice.

Operator-aligned

We have held the P&L in these businesses, so we read the risk the way an owner does.

Who we serve

Built for the people closest to the asset

Private equity sponsors

Mid-market funds investing in asset-heavy, operationally complex maritime and transport businesses.

Business owners & founders

Owner-led companies preparing for a sale, recapitalization, or their next phase of growth.

Lenders & credit funds

Capital providers who need an operator's read on the asset behind the loan.

Bring us your next deal
